In fact most dark guilds were founded and operate under the pretense of reviving Zeref, and helping him to conquer the world. name: Tao Hu
description: __Vision:__ Pyro __Constellation:__ Papilio Charontis Hu Tao is the 77th Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, a person vital to managing Liyue's funerary affairs. She does her utmost to flawlessly carry out a person's last rites and preserve the world's balance of yin and yang. Aside from this, she is also a talented poet whose many "masterpieces" have passed around Liyue's populace by word of mouth. She is voiced by Rie Takahashi.
